branch_cards.likely_gain: close publisher parity with minimal coordination shock
stop_conditions: do not harden non-empty gating until each owner repo can publish one bounded receipt
do not treat warning-only audit output as proof that parity is complete

branch_cards.likely_gain: capture the activation route as a reusable scenario before more owners go live
branch_cards.likely_cost: extra authoring overhead before direct parity closeout
stop_conditions: stop if the route is still changing faster than the playbook outline
stop if owner-specific activation steps remain too divergent

branch_cards.likely_gain: instant strict readiness truth in aoa-stats
branch_cards.likely_cost: expected hard failures across four owner repos
stop_conditions: stop if the gate would fail before owners have a published bounded receipt example
stop if warnings are still the only honest posture for staged federation activation

hold_option.reason: owner repos may need one bounded activation pass before the route law stabilizes
